name: Anonos
description: Anonos — Data privacy platform providing pseudonymization and synthetic data generation for regulatory compliance.

seo.title: Anonos — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Anonos: Anonos — Data privacy platform providing pseudonymization and synthetic data generation for regulatory compliance.

when_to_use: Pseudonymizing PII before sending data to analytics teams
Generating synthetic datasets for GDPR-compliant testing
De-identifying clinical data for research pipelines
Enabling cross-border data transfer with privacy guarantees
Replacing prod data with compliant synthetic copies for dev

pros: Patented Variant Twin synthetic data approach
cons: Overlap with more dev-friendly synth data tools
review.verdict: Compliance-heavy pseudonymization platform for regulated enterprises, engineers may find dev-first tools easier.
review.best_for: Regulated industries needing GDPR-defensible data pseudonymization with legal cover
review.not_for: Developer teams just wanting fast synthetic data for testing environments

lock_in.reason: Proprietary pseudonymization pipelines hard to migrate
